PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT AFFIDAVIT OF REASONABLE DILIGENCE; POS BY MAIL ATTACHED: FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED SEP-22-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BARYLAU, SIARHEI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FILED BY BHUJBAL, SUHAS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BARYLAU, SIARHEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF SIARHEI BARYLAU & DEFENDANT SUHAS BHUJBAL. IRINA BARYLAU, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. SIDDHARTH PARASNIS WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS MARATHI INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT. ALBERT RYAN, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT SUHAS BHUJBAL & CROSS-DEFENDANT SIARHEI BARYLAU. SIDDHARTH PARASNIS WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS MARATHI INTERPRETER FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT. ALBERT RYAN, A WITNESS FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. IRINA BARYLAU, A WITNESS FOR CROSS-DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF MR. BHUJBAL'S CROSS-CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BARYLAU, SIARHEI
AFFIDAVIT OF CANCELLED SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARYLAU, SIARHEI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED AUG-18-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BHUJBAL, SUHAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARYLAU, SIARHEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BHUJBAL, SUHAS $1,975.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.48 INTEREST, $133.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,135.48 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BHUJBAL, SUHAS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BARYLAU, SIARHEI $1,824.88 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,854.88, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE AMOUNT OWED TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.12, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
